text: Find high-priority open cases in Salesforce.
expected_answer: A list of Salesforce cases where Status is not Closed and Priority is High.

text: Show me Salesforce opportunities in the 'Qualification' stage.
expected_answer: A list of Salesforce opportunities where StageName is 'Qualification'.

text: Show me 5 closed Salesforce cases including their close date and description.
expected_answer: A list of 5 closed Salesforce cases.
